entry.title: New: CR 25-54 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 92, CD1 (2025), to authorize the Mayor to enter into an intergovernmental agreement with the Federal Bureau of Investigation to participate in the Joint Terrorism Task Force, Honolulu Division.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
